title: metroxylon sagu f. longispinum
intro: Metroxylon sagu f. longispinum, also known as the sago palm or long-spined sago palm, is a variant of the Metroxylon sagu plant, specifically characterized by its long spines on the trunk and leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The longispinum variant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and sap are used to make various remedies, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
